violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Shelving below front counter has bare wood and needs painted. -Shelving in Pepsi cooler is rusty.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Cutting boards on 2 prep tables have deep cuts and are not cleanable anymore. They are very soiled.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside all coolers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving, milk crates, racks in kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceiling are very dirty and need deep cleaned.
